lore.english:
Taimanin. Top of the 7th division within "Katonshu", a group within the Fire Art Taimanins. Originally served Fuuma Danjo, and during his rebellion, she led the Katonshu in an assault against the Igawa clan. After Danjo's defeat, she was recruited by Igawa Asagi and appointed as Captain of the 7th Division in Katonshu. However, she complains that this was merely "a title given to keep the complaints quiet," showing clear dissatisfaction. 

Normally, she appears to be nothing more than a harmless old woman, but in truth, she is cunning and cruel, provoking others with offhand remarks, delighting in diversion tactics. She uses "Oil Art", producing oil from her own body to flood enemies before setting them ablaze, wiping out her foes in one fell swoop.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&HP] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase HP of All allies by 25% in Arena
skills.description_readable: Increase HP of All allies by 25% in Arena

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Oil Art: Oil Shot[-]
skills.description:
Shoots oil from their fingertips, to attack the enemy.
Target hit is [&Provocation]ed at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1110102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1110102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Shoots oil from their fingertips, to attack the enemy.
Target hit is Taunted at a 5% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Oil Art: Oil Bath[-]
skills.description:
Wears oil around the body and gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1110201]%)[-] [&EvdUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1110201] turn(s)
If [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_11102] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1110202]%)[-] [&SpdDown] to the attacker when hit at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1110202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1110202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Wears oil around the body and gains (19.5%) EVD UP.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If Oil Art: Oil Bath is on Cooldown, inflicts (-24%) SPD DOWN to the attacker when hit at a 25% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Oil Art: Flame Disaster[-]
skills.description:
Breathes out fire, attacking [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] 3 times.
Removes [&Shield] from the targets.
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1110303]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1110303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1110303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Breathes out fire, attacking ALL enemies 3 times.
Removes Shield from the targets.
Targets hit are inflicted with (3.5%) Burn at a 20% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
